title: Ultra Realistic Cozy Japanese Korean Caf Photography
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Cozy Japanese Korean Caf Photography

imagePrompts.prompt:
.

Ultra-realistic cozy Japanese-Korean café photography featuring a cute young japanese couple sitting together naturally in a trendy aesthetic café. The young couple should look stylish and youthful, wearing deep teal, smiling softly and enjoying desserts together.
The table is beautifully filled with ramen bowl such as pancakes, strawberry cakes, macarons, croissants, pastries, iced coffees, matcha lattes, fruit desserts, and aesthetic drinks arranged in a visually satisfying composition. Add small aesthetic café props like linen notebook and ceramic cup on the table for a premium Pinterest moodboard feel.
Soft premium editorial style lighting enters through the café windows creating dreamy highlights, creamy shadows, glossy reflections on drinks, and realistic dessert textures. Background should contain softly blurred japanese signs, glowing café boards, handwritten Japanese text, neon typography, and aesthetic city café elements for an authentic Tokyo/Seoul vibe.
Add cute scrapbook-style doodles and handwritten notes around the image in tomato red ink — tiny hearts, stars, sparkles, ribbons, arrows, smiley sketches, bows, diary stickers, and handwritten café notes.
Color palette should focus on warm sand tones. Style inspired by viral Pinterest café photography, Korean lifestyle aesthetics, Japanese cozy café culture, dreamy Gen-Z romance mood, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, ultra realistic food textures, soft blurry background, ultra detailed realistic photography, clean aesthetic layout, 8k.
